summary: GTO Reference Dataset exposes preflop ranges and concept names that Archetype profiles reference when authors write contrast_with_gto commentary; section-4 also reads the glossary so commentary can name the same concepts walkthrough uses.

get_preflop_range.name: getPreflopRange
get_preflop_range.shape: (position: string, situation: string) => { [hand_class: string]: { action: string, frequency: number, sizing?: number } }
get_preflop_range.purpose: Archetype authors can reference GTO ranges by position when writing contrast_with_gto strings (e.g., 'GTO opens 18% from UTG; the calling station's range is closer to 35% any-suited-broadway').
get_preflop_range.note: This is a read-time reference for content authoring and may also be used by section-4 if a profile wants to express deviations as 'GTO-range plus delta'.

list_concepts.name: listConcepts
list_concepts.purpose: Allows contrast_with_gto strings to reference the same concept ids that walkthrough resolves.

data_passed_not_logic: Section-2 returns data; section-4 returns data (the static profile structures). Neither calls into the other at runtime decide() time except via these read APIs.
test_seam: Unit test: every concept_id referenced in any archetype's contrast_with_gto can be resolved via listConcepts(); every position used in profile preflop_frequencies has a corresponding GTO range available via getPreflopRange.
